params.name: Curator's Optical Magnifier
params.description: This is a magnifier designed specifically for the curator, with an elegant and exquisite overall design. The frame is made of sturdy brass, and the magnifier lens is a high-precision optical glass, with edges slightly glowing blue. No subtle scratch can escape the curator's eyes.
